initial_prompt:
Super-Eywa v1 runtime prompt snapshot.
Turn index: 1
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['transmute']
Prompt family: transmute
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:
Re-encode the provided problem into a structured, data-complete technical specification for a competitive programming agent. Your goal is to transform the narrative description into a precise, actionable problem statement. You must ensure that all input parameters, constraints, and variable definitions present in the original text are preserved and clearly organized. The resulting message must include: 1) A precise definition of the input domain and all constraints, 2) The exact mathematical objective function to be optimized, 3) All geometric, logical, or mathematical requirements, and 4) The required output format. The transmuted message must be self-contained so that an agent can implement a solution immediately without needing the original text.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "transmute",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "message_for_next_agent": "plain-text reformulation for the next agent"
}
Additional instruction prompt profiles: []
System prompt:


User prompt:

The transmuted message must be self-contained so that an agent can implement a solution immediately without needing the original text.

Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-S1-ahc001-atcoder-ad
Title: S1. AHC001 / AtCoder Ad

Problem:
Place many non-overlapping axis-aligned ad rectangles in a 10000 x 10000 square so each advertiser gets a rectangle containing its requested point and with area close to its requested target area.

Grading target:
Continuous score from advertiser satisfaction.
Higher is better.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
